name: inventpro-stock
description: Application web de gestion de stock professionnelle (ERP / PWA)

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.render-build: npm --prefix client install --include=dev && npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server install --include=dev && npm --prefix server run prisma:generate && npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix server run prisma:push && npm --prefix server run seed
